meaning: adj.海洋的,海洋产出的,生活于海洋的
examples: There are three basic processes that cause a change in oceanic salinity.
Soon layer of oceanic ooze began to accumulate above the old hard layer.
The Oceanic Society in San Francisco offers volunteer research trips as well as labor-free tours.
Oceanic transportation of natural gas is quite limited, so the market is essential continental.
